rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARBARA HIRSCHFELDER HANEN
rulings.Rulings: The Motion of Suzanne Waterman, Guardian ad Litem for David Howard Waterman, for Enforcement of Right to Discovery and for Sancstions is denied. Appointment as guardian ad litem merely gave Ms. Waterman the power to prosecute or defend actions on behalf of her minor son. It did not make either David Waterman or Suzanne Waterman a party to any action, and neither is a party to the action in question. Ms. Waterman is, however, entitled to purchase a copy of depositions from the court reporter pursuant to CCP section 2025.570. Sanctions are awarded against Ms. Waterman's counsel in favor of Sophie Breall in the amount of $900 and in favor of Louise Brucia Montalbano in the amount of $970. The late-filed opposition filed on behalf of Paul D. Miller will not be considered. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) prior to 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, August 01, 2012.
